sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109702" key="u(/skas" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὕσκας</orth>, prob. misspelling of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἴσκας</foreign> (v. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἴσκαι</foreign>) in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:91" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.91</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
